case_study_exempt_reason: iOS test/CI-infrastructure foundation (TC-T4): adds the swift-snapshot-testing SPM dep + harness + record-in-CI workflow. Snapshot baselines + screen coverage are follow-up tasks; PR body + this state.json are the provenance record.
summary: T4 (test-coverage plan §4) FOUNDATION — pointfreeco/swift-snapshot-testing SPM dep wired into FitTrackerTests + a snapshot harness (SnapshotTestSupport SNAPSHOT_MODE gate: tests SKIP by default so the required Build+Test never reddens pre-baseline) + starter design-system-component snapshots + an operator-triggered ios-snapshot-record.yml that records CI-environment baselines and uploads them as an artifact. Baselines can't be recorded locally (Xcode 26/iPhone 17 Pro local vs iPhone 15/16 CI). Verified locally: SnapshotTesting package resolves + test target compiles.

tasks.title: SPM dep (swift-snapshot-testing) + SnapshotTestSupport harness + starter DS-component snapshots + ios-snapshot-record.yml (record-in-CI)
Run ios-snapshot-record job → download artifact → commit CI-recorded baselines → flip harness into required test job (SNAPSHOT_MODE=verify)
tasks.notes: EXECUTED 2026-07-13. The recorder had NEVER produced baselines — three stacked bugs found + fixed: (1) missing GoogleService-Info.plist → build failed (added the Decode step mirroring ci.yml); (2) SNAPSHOT_MODE not reaching the sim test process (a runner env var / SIMCTL_CHILD_ is not inherited by xcodebuild's own sim launch) → all tests XCTSkip'd; fixed by adding SNAPSHOT_MODE=$(SNAPSHOT_MODE) to the scheme TestAction env + passing SNAPSHOT_MODE=record|verify as an xcodebuild build setting. Run #4 recorded 4 component baselines (AppProgressRing/AppPickerChip/AppSegmentedControl/AppMetricColumn), committed under __Snapshots__/. Verify wired as ADVISORY (ios-snapshot-verify.yml, NOT a required check — calibration window; snapshots are a documented high-flake surface) rather than the required job the original title named. Doc: docs/process/snapshot-testing.md. testHomeScreenV2 crashed at render (missing env object) → guarded to T3; see T3 note.

tasks.title: Expand snapshot coverage to the 6 v2 screens (Home/Stats/Settings/Nutrition/Training/Readiness) + 4 auth views with mock view-model/store injection
tasks.notes: Screen-level snapshot pattern established (2026-07-11): added an assertScreen helper (393x852 fixed light-mode) + testHomeScreenV2 mirroring MainScreenView's shipping #Preview env-object graph (EncryptedDataStore/HealthKitService/TrainingProgramStore/AppSettings/AnalyticsService/WatchConnectivityService). Verified: full target compiles + testHomeScreenV2 SKIPS cleanly in the default run (never reddens the required check). Remaining 5 v2 screens + 4 auth views need per-screen construction recipes — only MainScreenView ships a #Preview today; the others must grow one (or a mock view-model injector) before they can be snapshotted. Real baseline capture + render verification is gated on T2 (the ios-snapshot-record CI job records simulator-matched PNGs; local sim != CI sim per SnapshotTestSupport). | 2026-07-13 UPDATE: the assumption that testHomeScreenV2 'skips cleanly' held only because SNAPSHOT_MODE never reached the sim; once T2's env-passing was fixed, testHomeScreenV2 CRASHED in record mode: 'No ObservableObject of type ReadinessAwareAlertStore' — the recipe's env-object graph is incomplete (ReadinessAwareAlertStore missing, possibly more behind it). Now guarded with XCTSkipIf(true) so it never breaks the T2 component pipeline. T3 must complete the Home recipe (+ the other 5 screens/4 auth views) then re-record.
